headline: Teen Slay Squad 🎯🔫 Mosque Massacre 😱🕌 Selfie 💀🚗
text: San Diego teens aged 17 and 18 🎒🔫 went full psycho mode 😈💥 at the Islamic Center mosque 🕌🕋 in a suspected hate crime spree, capping three innocent victims outside the front doors before turning their own guns on themselves in a tragic self-own 💀🔄. Cops were already on scene for a suicidal teen tip when the shots rang out, finding the bodies of a heroic security guard dad-of-eight 👨‍👧‍👦🛡️ who straight up saved lives by blocking the attack from getting way worse, plus two other fallen worshippers. The young duo rolled up in camo fits 🪖🟫, one leaving a note dripping with generalized hate rhetoric and hate speech 📝😡 but zero specific mosque threats. Mom called 911 hours earlier after her son dipped with her guns and whip, but police vibes were off from a straight suicide play. They blasted a landscaper nearby too but only grazed his hard hat like a boss dodge 🪖💨. Officers cleared the school and mall, kids holding hands through the lot while nearby campuses locked down 🔒👦. Imam Taha called it outrageous to hit a house of worship not a battlefield 🕌🙏. Gov Newsom was horrified at the terror on families and faith communities while Trump labeled it a terrible situation and promised strong follow-up. Eid al-Adha prep was on deck for the Muslim community but this hate-fueled nightmare put the whole city on edge. FBI begging for tips as witnesses heard up to 30 semi-auto bangs 💥🔫. No bubble here, just pure tragedy and questions left hanging like a bad pun on a bullet hole 😩🕳️!
